name: AngelFolio (New Website)
desc: My new Portfolio website that I am currently building out. Uses MDX for blog posts, Supabase for project  and post metadata, Github API to retrieve contributor info and Github accounts, and the spotify API to display what I am currently listening to!
summary: New Portfolio website using MDX, NextJS, and Supabase
lessons: MDX is an awesome tool for writing blog posts with interactive JSX content
